violations.description: Button contains only an emoji (🔍) with no accessible name. Screen readers cannot determine the button's purpose.
Button contains only an emoji (⬆️) with no accessible name.
Button contains only an emoji (❤️) with no accessible name.
Button contains only an emoji (☰) with no accessible name.

page_description: A photo gallery application with a dark theme. The toolbar has four icon-only buttons (search, upload, favorites, menu) with no aria-label or accessible name.
